entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud Accelerator-based UI storefront vs Composable storefront (Spartacus)
entry.content:
Will SAP support Commerce Cloud Accelerator UI storefront after 2027 ?

Should we shift to Composable storefront (Spartacus) ?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Project Plan Cost are different
entry.content:
hello @Keratiya_D 

The difference between your 8M Financial Plan and 4M shown in the Project Costs app is usually due to below highlights

  • Different Plan Versions selected in each app
  • Filters applied (WBS elements, Cost Category, Fiscal Year)
  • Currency settings mismatch (Company Code vs. Project Currency)
  • Not all planned costs are assigned to visible WBS levels
  • Mixing of Plan, Actual, and Commitment values

What to do!

  • Check Plan Version consistency in both apps
  • Align filters and selection parameters
  • Ensure currency settings are the same
  • Review sub-WBS elements for hidden costs

Check below the SAP reference
3535188 - How to use APP 'Import Financial Plan Data'

Hope that helps!

Best regards,
Chuma

entry.title: Re: Invoice Date Control While Creating Customer Invoice
entry.content:
Hello @serap_acar 

This classic BADI doesn't exist. The S4HANA Public Cloud has limited, predefined enhancement options, and currently, billing-related logic can't be changed using this specific BADI.

Your options for influencing billing processes are

  • Using the available Custom Logic enhancement points, but these are limited for SD Billing
  •  Leveraging APIs or Events via Communication Scenarios for external processing
  • Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP if your requirement is critical

If your project needs logic similar to SD_BILLING_DOCUMENT_CREATE, and it's not supported in Public Cloud as i previously ask you to check, you can Check the available enhancement options through the SAP Extensibility Catalogue

entry.title: Re: How to short automatic packing HU in putaway
entry.content:
Hello @imel_99 

The automatic HU packing depends on your active scope in S/4HANA Public Cloud.

If Warehouse Management (5DV) or Advanced Shipping & Receiving (2EJ) are activated, you can use Packaging Specifications to control how HUs are filled, typically prioritising full HUs first.

If only basic inbound processes are in scope, advanced HU split logic may not be available.

I recommend you check active scope items in CB and review the Packaging Specification setup for correct HU capacity and UoM settings

If full HU-first packing isn’t working despite proper setup, it may require a support ticket, as Public Cloud has limited custom logic for HU packing.

Check these SAP References:

SAP Help: Handling Units in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

SAP Best Practices for Warehouse Management - Public Cloud

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Unable to create follow-up service order via API_SERVICE_ORDER_SRV – linkage to parent missing
entry.content:
We are implementing service order creation in SAP S/4HANA 2023 (Private Cloud Edition) using the OData API `API_SERVICE_ORDER_SRV`. Our business requirement is to create a **follow-up service order** that links back to an existing (parent) service order, similar to document flow logic in SAP CRM.

We have tested the following fields during service order creation:

- `ReferenceServiceOrder` (header level)
- `ReferenceServiceOrderItem` (item level)
- `RefServiceOrderTemplate`
- `RefServiceOrderTemplateItem`

In all cases:
- The service order is created successfully, but no transactional linkage to the parent order is formed.
- No document flow appears in the UI or via API.
- The fields appear to behave as free-text reference fields with no functional impact.

We would like to confirm the following:

1. Is there a supported mechanism to create a **follow-up service order** (predecessor-successor relationship) using `API_SERVICE_ORDER_SRV`?
2. If not, is there an enhancement planned in a future release or a known workaround (e.g., BAdI, enhancement spot)?
3. Is there any supported way to reflect document flow between service orders — e.g., similar to CRM’s `CRMD_LINK` or ECC’s `VBFA`?

We are following clean-core principles and would like to avoid classic BAPI fallback unless absolutely necessary.

Example payload tested:
- Parent service order: `8000001234`
- Targeted linkage via fields like `ReferenceServiceOrder`, `RefServiceOrderTemplate`, etc.

Please advise on whether follow-up creation is supported via standard APIs or must be implemented via extensions.

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation.ERROR_MSG_NO_METADATA when executing a form in SAP Build
entry.content:
I'm working on a student admission process built in SAP Build Process Automation, and I'm running into a metadata issue when the workflow gets triggered.

In the inbox, I get an error that says: ERROR_MSG_NO_METADATA, and the instance goes straight into ERRONEOUS status. I suspect the form was originally deployed in a public environment that's now deprecated.

Has anyone faced something similar? What’s the best way to recover the workflow or rebuild it so I can deploy in a shared environment without losing the design?

Thanks ! Any tips would be appreciated

entry.title: Re: Splash Screen - SAP BTP Mobile Service - Not Working...
entry.content: It is in testing now and if all goes well should be out by end of next week.

entry.title: [BYD] Mass Export of PDF documents of Scanned Invoices
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

 

I have a request and query regarding the mass export of Supplier PDF invoices from the system.

However, while looking to export these, I could not figure out a possibility to do a mass export but only the possibility of individual export by going through each supplier invoices which is very tedious and time consuming.

Therefore, I wanted to ask if there is any way to fulfil this requirement of mass export?

 

Please do let me know about the possible solution.

 

Best Regards,

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [BYD] Mass Export of PDF documents of Scanned Invoices
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

Thank you for reaching out. I have explored two potential methods to address your special requirements, but unfortunately, neither approach meets the criteria needed.

  •  **Data Extraction Method**: Creating a Data Extraction under the Data Extraction View of Application and User Management Work Center was attempted. However, there is no corresponding Business Object available for this specific task.
  • **Invoice Scanning Export**: Exporting the invoice scanning work list data to Microsoft Excel using the Export button in the Invoice Scanning view of the Supplier Invoicing work center. This method only exports the invoice scanning work list with the PDFs' names, which does not fulfill the requirement.

Given these limitations, the only viable solution appears to be manually processing each item individually. If you have any further questions or need additional assistance, please feel free to let me know. I am here to help. 

 

Best regards,

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: How to short automatic packing HU in putaway
entry.content:
Hi Chuma,

Thank you for your advice. After I activate 5 DV & 2EJ, would you like to explain what the specific configuration is that allows me to maintain Packaging Specifications to control how HUs are filled, typically prioritising full HUs first? Because I can't find the specific way to maintain this here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/87f9b54f9c4f4e75aff0061860a6589a/8cd6fb022fa441fdb110fa511b2d4347.html?q=Handling+Units+

 

Regards, 

Melani

entry.title: Re: 🇧🇷 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (São Paulo, Brazil)
entry.content: Mais um ano Diogo! Partiuuuuuuuu!

entry.title: How to Manage Multi-User Conversation History in a RAG App with Generative AI Hub SDK
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a question regarding application development using the Generative AI Hub.

Goal:
I am developing a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) application using the Generative AI Hub SDK and Flask (Python). My goal is to deploy this application on SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry, and enable multiple users to access it concurrently.

Current Situation:

  • Architecture:
    • AI Model: Generative AI Hub
    • Orchestration: Using the Orchestration Workflow from the Generative AI Hub SDK
    • Application Framework: Flask (Python)
    • Deployment Target: SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry

The Challenge:
My main challenge is figuring out how to manage conversation history separately for each user when multiple users are interacting with the application simultaneously. The current implementation is nearly stateless, which means conversation history is either shared across all users or not maintained at all.

Questions:

  1. Managing Conversation History:
    What is the best practice for persisting user-specific conversation history (chat history) for a Flask application running on Cloud Foundry? Should I use an external storage service like SAP HANA Cloud or Redis to store the history, linking it to a session ID or user ID?
  2. Alternative Implementation Methods:
    Are there any simpler methods available within the Generative AI Hub SDK or LangChain to manage user-specific conversation context without relying on external storage?

Any advice, code examples, or documentation you could point me to would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Re: SAP Databricks in SAP Business Data Cloud : Unifying SAP Business Data with Lakehouse Intelligen
entry.content: @BenedictV  Good news. We have SAP Business Data cloud including SAP Databricks available in https://www.sap.com/products/data-cloud/trial.html. Please check it out. Thanks.

entry.content:
Hello,

As mentioned in the title, I would like to know how to request the TDR (Test Data Refresh) service and what the associated costs are.

I've reviewed the available documentation and key Q&A resources, but I may have missed the relevant information. I would appreciate any guidance or references you could provide regarding this process.

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: How to set Output Determination Configuration Support for Purchase Order in SAP
entry.content:
Request for BRF+ Output Determination Configuration Support for Purchase Order in SAP public cloud system, how to do it？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set Output Determination Configuration Support...
entry.content:
Hi,

For how to setup output management, please view scope item Output Management (1LQ) for more details. Hope it helps.

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/1LQ?region=DE

This scope item is for the output in all scenarios. If your requirement is related to Purchase order scenario, please note select "Purchase Order" under business rules in App Output Parameter Determination. Thanks.


Have a nice day.
Thanks and Best Regards

entry.title: Ledger 4G defined in CoCd ×××× is not active in SAP Public Cloud Asset Accounting
entry.content:
When posting acquisition value to fixed assets, the system reported an error: "Ledger 4G defined in CoCd ×××× is not active in Asset Accounting". According to SAP Note 3447821, we attempted to assign the accounting principle to ledger 4G/company code in CBC, Meanwhile, Ledger 0L has also adopted the same accounting principle, but the system did not allow saving and reported an error. The error screenshot is as follows:

Also attached are other relevant screenshots：

entry.title: Re: SF Report Story for Performance Distribution
entry.content:
Thanks @Olga_Antipina .

Yes, you are right. the logic didn't make any sense to me when we added it. I had to get the # of Male as a measure then divide this by TotalNumber of male count.

Then repeat this for other genders which fixed the issue.

Kind regards

Richie

entry.title: Re: 物料类型为内部编码时，如何使用 i_producttp_2 创建物料，提供一些参考代码

当前，Product的相关API还不支持创建物料的同时使用内部编号，请参考回答：Solved: API_PRODUCT with Internal Number Assignment - SAP Community

但是有一个CIP，初步给的计划是在2508 / 2602 发布，您可以继续关注：Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: Calling RFC BAPI within SAP Data Services

entry.title: 在采购预制发票过账时(MIRO)出现过账完成财务凭证已生成 但发票状态还是预制状态 并且还能继续过账
entry.content: 有几张采购预制发票出现了特殊情况 采购预制发票界面 点击过账  过账成功生成了财务凭证 但是预制发票仍然是可修改的状态 查询后台表RBKP 发现预制发票的状态仍然是预制状态并未变成已过账状态 并且还能继续点击过账按钮 继续生成凭证 重复生成的凭证影响到了财务报表的生成 且重复生成的凭证凭证信息有缺失

entry.title: Re: Can not find app - Edit Actual Costing Runs (CKMLCP)
entry.content:
Dear grace：

Thank you for your enthusiastic reply. I have already resolved the issue.

The solution is to refer to Note 3355170 and add a catalog to the standard inventory roles. (Previously, I created a new role myself, so there may have been some issues.)

Thank you& Best regards.

wang

entry.title: Re: Solution Documentation Changed at field is not updated
entry.content: Implement the following note with the latest version. No further setting has to be done. The issue in the list view or object list should be solved. 3396416 - 'Changed By' and 'Changed At' are not updated for External Elements

If you are in the same transport domain, then there is no need to create the domain link.

BR

entry.title: Account object Profit Center differs from that in asset master record upon DATA MIGRATION
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

Would like to know how to solve this issue, " Account object Profit Center differs from that in asset master record" Message AAPO189.

Reproducing the issue ;

1. Upload file for data migration - Source Data for Fixed asset - postings. 

2. Upon simulation, error messagfe AAPO189 is received. 

 

Cost centers and profit centers are properly aligned and setup in the system. We can't identify the source of this error.

Thanks.

Regards, 

Melle 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit

entry.title: A standard product proposal procedure O00001 and B00001
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I would like to understand the behavior of a standard product proposal procedures O00001 Online-Read Proposal, and B00001 Batch exp. Smoothing, which are used for Procedure Determination in the Intelligent Product Proposal.
My assumption is that, when the procedures O00001 or B00001 are used, the system searches for a relevant sales order history and the history record is hold in the system on a monthly basis, that is, in a sales order creation by like VA01 the system checks the history record for the previous month or before that.
For example, when I try to create a sales order in July, the system searches for a sales order history that were created in the previous month June or before that.
Can somebody answer if my assumption as above is correct.

Thank you and regards,

Yasuyo Goto

Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Handling CSRF tokens in SAP Cloud Platform Integration
entry.content:
Hi @NitinGupta11,

I tried two approaches to resolve the error:

  1. Content Modifier Approach:
    Add a Content Modifier before the Request Reply (POST call) to include the required headers and message body. Also, in the adapter (HTTP or OData), set * in both the Request Header and Response Header fields.

  2. Disable CSRF Protection:
    If the above doesn't work, try disabling CSRF protection for the APIs or OData service. You can follow the steps in this SAP Community post:
    How to disable X-CSRF-Token in SICF service (not OData service)

Please try both options. Hope this helps!

entry.title: Intermittent Alert Delivery Issue in SAP B1 (Version 10.0 SP 2408)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have configured several alerts in SAP Business One (version 10.0 SP 2408 HANA), with both internal and email notifications enabled. The SMTP mail configuration is working correctly, and alerts are typically being sent without any issues.

However, I’ve observed an intermittent issue:
On certain days, neither the internal alerts nor the email alerts are triggered as expected. Interestingly, once the server is restarted the next day (our server operates from 08:00 AM to 08:00 PM), all the pending alerts from the previous day are sent out immediately after the server starts. This behavior occurs approximately twice a month.

Could anyone advise what might be causing this issue? Also, is there a recommended way to simulate or diagnose the problem?

Looking forward to your suggestions.

Best regards,
Sreesaj

entry.title: Re: Calculation technique in SAP SD
entry.content: When you create a discussion, please try to share a detailed information.  With that screen shot, it is not clear what is quantity 1 & 2 columns and how the net value has been arrived.  Please explain what the Business requirement is and how your current pricing procedure is configured

entry.title: Re: Solman : change status of IT Requirement document usi...
entry.content:
Hi Raghu,

Changing status via database table is always exceptional cases which needs to contact SAP support for further help.

If you want to do it by yourself, you need to get the related database tables, find the correct table to change via debugging, using correct GUID to find the correct record, then via debugging to change the table entry. Unless you are familiar with these, otherwise kindly raise a support ticket for this.

BR

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere News in April

Hi @kpsauer ,

in your Blog Post you are mentioning "Analytic Model Stacking" as one of your top features in April.

Today I have seen that the Feature "Analytic model: stacking of analytic models" has been postponed to Q3 on the Roadmap.

Can you provide some background information about this?

Best Regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud Accelerator-based UI storefront vs...
entry.content:
The removal dates are as follows:

  • Accelerator UI templates and associated AddOns: Removal and end of mainstream maintenance in September 2027. End of extended adoption period: September 2028 (corresponds with Java framework update adoption period).

  • OCC v2 template extensions and associated AddOns: Removal and end of mainstream maintenance in September 2027. End of extended adoption period: September 2028 (corresponds with Java framework update adoption period).
  • Code associated with OCC v1: Removed in the 2211.16 update release (December 2023).

    Please refer the following hep doc link as well for more information:
    Deprecated Accelerator UI and OCC Template Extensions - Removal from SAP Commerce Cloud 2211 in 2027 | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Request: Where-Used List for HANA Views & BEx Queries...
entry.content:
Hi @Sivaramakrishnan_Manickam,

we at TITECON use either the Data Analyzer or build a Story called "Depency Viewer" on the SAC standard model "RESOURCE". This model is available in every SAC, you may need to be authorized.

Let´s assume you´re using BW Queries / Hana Live connections only and you´re only using Stories, please filter as follows:

  • Access Resource Type = STORY
  • Object Type = STORY
  • Dependency Type = EXTERNALCONNECTION (you might want to consider to not restrict this and show it as Dimension; possible Values are not only the "EXTERNALCONNECTION", but also "THEMING", "WIDGET_ADD_ON", "CUBE" [import Model] etc.)

Please add the following Elements in the rows:

  • Object Name --> Story Name
  • Dependency Type (if not filtered to only one value; see above)
  • Dependency Name --> For dependency type "EXTERNALCONNECTION" this is the name of the Live-Model 
  • Dependency ID --> some silly ID, but may be useful, if for any reason you have two live models with the same name, but different ID

As Measure in the columns please add "RESOURCE".

Within a story, I suggest to add a page filter to "Object Name" (which is in this case the name of the story), so that you can easily filter on one specific story you´re interested in. We usually also add the dependency type as filter, since we do not fix filter on EXTERNALCONNECTION.

Please note: The Dependence Name will be the name of your model, not the query/hana view which is the basis for this model. At least in our projects, we also advise to name models like BW4LIVE-QueryName, HANALIVE-QueryName, so that everyone already knows what the model is accessing without looking into it.

Best regards,
Denis

PS: Please mark as accepted solution, if this answers your question. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Votes wanted for improvement idea for Central Procurement improvement
entry.content: Remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement and add tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Re: Request: Where-Used List for HANA Views & BEx Queries...
entry.content:
Hello @Sivaramakrishnan_Manickam,

You could use API api/v1/stories?include=models to get a JSON file with information of stories and used models in your tenant. The created JSON file could be used as data source in Excel for instance. There exists a column with technical name of query of a used model in your story:

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud Accelerator-based UI storefront vs...
entry.content:
Please follow the below help doc link for this information:
Deprecated Accelerator UI and OCC Template Extensions - Removal from SAP Commerce Cloud 2211 in 2027 | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud Accelerator-based UI storefront vs...
entry.content:
The removal dates are as follows:
Accelerator UI templates and associated AddOns: Removal and end of mainstream maintenance in September 2027. End of extended adoption period: September 2028 (corresponds with Java framework update adoption period).

OCC v2 template extensions and associated AddOns: Removal and end of mainstream maintenance in September 2027. End of extended adoption period: September 2028 (corresponds with Java framework update adoption period).

Code associated with OCC v1: Removed in the 2211.16 update release (December 2023).

entry.title: Re: Handling CSRF tokens in SAP Cloud Platform Integration
entry.content:
HI @Zaid_Belim1 ,

Thanks for responding, I have tried the first option you suggested along with many others but whenever before the post call I try to add x-csrf-token in content modifier with the actual token value it always takes value like "SHA256:551397da739*****" and the actual CSRF value that was fetched does not appears in the header x-csrf-token. To get the actual token value i have tried following:

1. after the Get call to fetch the token, I added Content Modifier 1 to assign the value to property "CSRF" which works fine as I can see it in properties: 

in next Content modifier step I tried assigning this token value to x-csrf-token by ${property.CSRF}, but when i see the traces it still shows that SHA256 value:

I also tried deleting the header x-csrf-token before assigning it again in step before the POST call, but still no matter how many times I delete the headers by content modifier or by Groovy, as soon as I add expression x-csrf-token as ${property.CSRF}, x-csrf-token always comes as SHA256: **** .

I even tried fetching CSRF in one iflow, setting it in body and then passing it to another iflow using Process Direct, but there also as soon as i set x-csrf-token as ${body} again the x-csrf-token appears as SHA256*** 

with all these I kept on getting 403 "CSRF Token not Validated" error in Response header.

If for you option 1 worked, will it be possible for you to share the iflow step by step?

entry.title: Re: Overall Performance Rating for Compensation Module -...
entry.content:
Dear DavidSomelofske,
thank you very much for your quick reply and explanation. Sorry, I explained it wrong. We currently have 2 different PM templates. 1 template whose valuation is used for succession management and whose value is stored in the talent profile. And a second PM template whose performance rating is used for the compensation module. Now we have the problem that we are not sure if this is according to the SAP standard, that we have 2 separate PM templates and thus the performance rating that is displayed in the Talent Profile is not used for Compensation, but only for Succession. We are currently discussing internally whether it is still according to the SAP standard that we have several performance templates and therefore several performance ratings, or whether it is also okay according to the SAP standard that you can have several PM templates.

Thank you in advance for your help.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Set up Ariba Buying base edition with S4 public Cloud...

You can also try to view the workflow logs in App Flexible Workflow Administration. https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F5343')/S34 Thanks and Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Service with Advanced Execution in SAP S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi, 

Is there any help document available to understand the use and significance of the product we need to use for service Quotation/Contract with different scenario. 

I am not not able to find main significance of the material type (SERV) we are setting up for the different scenaio how to let the customer know about the product use.

Appreciate your responce and helping to understand the concept of the product use for the different scenario.

entry.title: Re: Custom Code decommission - Transaction usage
entry.content: Only transactions/programs that are recorded by ST03N/SCMON will be analyzed by Decommitioning Cockpit.

entry.title: Re: Handling CSRF tokens in SAP Cloud Platform Integration
entry.content:
@NitinGupta11,

You should try the second option. The X-CSRF-Token value is overridden by the CPI runtime by default, which is a fairly common issue by CPI itself.

The better approach is to disable CSRF protection on the API or service, following the steps I shared in the link earlier — that should definitely help.

Once CSRF is disabled, you’ll only need to include the following header:
X-Requested-With: X

This might also explain why the first option you tried was partially working.

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP Build: Create Apps, Processes and Sites Without Code (Bengaluru, India)
entry.content:
This is the all-new and revised SAP CodeJam event for SAP Build low-code/no-code tooling and will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps, business processes, and business sites without coding. 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • An apps landing page (SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition)

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • It can be helpful to bring a tablet or second laptop, if you have.
  • Complete these prerequisites BEFORE you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam 

Location and Date:

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for August 1st, Friday, 2025 from 09:00 - 16:00 local time (IST) in Bengaluru, India. The language of the event and the content will be English.

Event Address: Bosch EC3 (360° Business Park), Electronic City Phase I, Doddathoguru, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560100, India

Google maps location: https://maps.app.goo.gl/nFkWrsEptwqE3ExL7

  • The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates  @eshrinivasan and @Rekha_DR 
  • Thank you Robert Bosch for hosting this event.

Please note that spaces are limited! We can only accommodate 45 attendees. If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section above to the right.

entry.title: Number of Performance Templates per year according to SAP Standard
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a question about the number of performance templates (e.g. for the year 2025) in the context of the SAP standard. We are currently having a discussion about how many performance templates should be used per year according to the SAP standard.

On the one hand, we have a performance template whose rating is subsequently used for Succession Management and on the other hand, we have another performance template whose rating is subsequently used for Compensation.

The performance rating used for Succession Management is entered in the Talent Profile.

Now, the discussion came up that we do not meet the SAP Standard as we have 2 Performance Template. Our concern is that there should only exist 1 Performance Template with 1 Performance Rating. and this 1 Performance Rating should then be used for the Succession Management and for Compensation. Currently, we use for Comp and Succession Mg. 2 different Performance Ratings.

Thank you in advance for your help.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Bring 'Done' SFCs back to work
entry.content:
Hi @ManoelCosta ,

I followed the same steps as you mentioned in the blog , was not able to get the Done SFC in worklist.

what can the reasons for not getting the SFC in the worklist

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Part 4 - Subcontracting with GST
entry.content:
Fantastic! Thank you Sagnik!

Tremendous effort 🙂

entry.title: Re: Publish views from POD's to other users
entry.content:
I also tried it, but there was the issue that first the worklist is loaded with the default settings of the WC/Resource configured in the POD.

Then the URL parameters are set in the filtering but no refresh is done, so this means that you see incorrect data at that time. That is the big difference with the view, if you store the WC/Resource selection in a view and you select that view then also a refresh of the worklist is done.

entry.title: Re: Contract Termination-Derecognition of contract not po...
entry.content:
Hello,

It looks like the termination of the contract is performed incorrectly.

please let us know the steps you are doing to perform the Termination.

 

Thank you.

Nayamath

We are using SAM 2305.

Purge job /MFND/CORE_CLNT_ST_PURGE_PROG is running on daily basis with below input selection-

 I'm looking for direction from here to resolve this.

entry.title: Re: Cannot update Picklist after updating source document
entry.content:
Hi, 

thanks for your quick answer, but your solution does not help at all. Even PATCH with minimal atributes to firstly increase ReleasedQuantity will result with same error.

{
    "error": {
        "code": "-2039",
        "details": [
            {
                "code": "",
                "message": ""
            }
        ],
        "message": "Another user or another operation modified data; to continue, open the window again (ODBC -2039)"
    }
}

entry.title: Way to automatically remove roles from users who haven't accessed the system
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Is there a way to automatically remove roles  from users who haven't accessed the server for a long time?

I heard that Ariba has automatic user (unused) lock in the system.

Please let me know if there are any similar features.

This is one of the requirements for an audit.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Way to automatically remove roles from users who have...
entry.content:
Hope you are doing well!

There is no such application job in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to remove roles.

However, there is a way to lock unused users as mentioned in the Help Portal Page below:

How to Lock Unused Business Users | SAP Help Portal

You can adjust the parameter and the setting inside for your business requirement.

Thanks and Best Regards,

Bell

entry.title: Re: Review Task in calendar is not changing state from Open to In Progress
entry.content: I would suggest you create a ticket to SAP on this.

entry.title: Re: Calculation technique in SAP SD
entry.content: SAP Help: Price Management

entry.title: Fetching Document id's for a Contract Workspace through Api
entry.content:
Hello Everyone, 
I need to fetch the Document id's belonging to a Contract Workspace through Ariba API, i have tried with Contract Workspace Retrieval API but it only supports the /contractWorkspaces/:contractId and /contractWorkspaces. I was not able to find any API call to get the Document Id's. Could anyone help regarding this.   

Thank you

entry.title: Synchronous Goods Receipts in EWM decentralized warehouses with MIGO
entry.content:
Scenario: 2 EWM decentralized warehouses mapped under the same ERP plant.  Shipments between warehouses are done daily in both directions. No billing / invoicing involved. 
Request: Research possibility to trigger the movements directly from MIGO tx. (311 movement) in order to avoid the standard INTRACO STO.  Currently they managed both physical warehouses under the same roof at their current WMS. We want to find the easiest setup to avoid this configuration in the future
Comments: 

  • Could we use Synchronous goods receipt in this scenario? My understanding is that we cannot. 
  • Is there any way to trigger the deliveries from MIGO under this scenario?
  • Suggestions and /or experiences for this kind of situations are welcome. 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Intermittent Alert Delivery Issue in SAP B1 (Version...
entry.content:
Hi sreesajs

Please check with effected database, if there is a lot number of unsent email with status U

 elect * from ALR1 where Status = 'U'

Have you tried to uninstall job service ?

kind Regards
Nidhi 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: what is the odatav2 api to add a material assignment...
entry.content: thank you Edna, this seems to do the job

entry.title: Re: Intermittent Alert Delivery Issue in SAP B1 (Version...
entry.content:
Hi Nidhi,

Thank you for your comment.

I checked the query:
SELECT * FROM ALR1 WHERE Status = 'U'
—but it returned no records.

However, there are several entries with Status = 'E'.

I also tried uninstalling and reinstalling the Job Service, but the issue still persists even after that.

Please let me know if you have any further suggestions.

Best regards,
Sreesaj

entry.title: Official Documentation on Enabling Self-Use Users with 30:1 FUE Ratio in S/4HANA Cloud Starter Syste
entry.content:
Hi all,

An initial check on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Starter System showed that Self-Use users (counted at a 30:1 FUE ratio) can be enabled for:

  • Purchase Requisition creation (app F2229)

  • Purchase Requisition approval

  • Goods Receipt posting

Looking for official SAP documentation to confirm this and guidance on how to enable these users properly.

Any pointers or help would be appreciated. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Profit and loss adjustment for cash discounts in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Hi Batista, where is this document split activated? In our current system, the cash discount correction is not posted to the asset after payment.

entry.title: How to get e-mail notification for EWA reports
entry.content:
Hi SAP, 

The client needs to add one more person to receive an email with the Early watch report from Production system attached in .PDF

Currently only one person in the company receives this email from: SAP ECS GCE CEIA<noreply-SAP-ECSPC3-CEIA@sap.com>

This client is in RISE, and does not have Solution manager installed in his landscape, the EWA is processed in SAP side. 

Can you let me know how to achieve this?

 

 

 

I am attaching to this ticket the email that the client receives, and the Production system is open if you need access to check. Thank you.

 

 

 

PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to get e-mail notification for EWA reports
entry.content:
Dear Customer，

Regarding your query, could you please refer to  KBA: 2530034 - How to manage e-mail, SMS, and/or SAP for Me notifications - SAP for Me

Sincerely,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Why is health monitoring not working for Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi Kurt,

thank you for reaching out to us. In general we have many customer which are using Health Monitoring to monitor Datasphere.

In your case it is difficult to answer without an deep investigation. I would propose to reach out to cloudalm@sap.com so that we can align and have together a look why it suddenly stopped.

 

Best Regards

Qendrim

entry.title: How to download Client Certificate for SAP Business ByDesign?
entry.content:
How to download the full chain Client Certificate from SAP Business ByDesign system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to download Client Certificate for SAP Business B...
entry.content:
The SAP Business ByDesign certificate can be downloaded without creating a communication arrangement.

  1. In SAP Business ByDesign, go to the Application and User Management work center.
  2. Select Communication Arrangements and choose Download Tenant Certificate.
You can also refer to the below Help Document and KBA:
  • Downloading Client Certificate for SAP Business ByDesign
  • 3307537 - How to Download the Full Chain Certificate From SAP Business ByDesign System to Use in Peppol

entry.title: Re: Couldn't establish a secure connection to SAP BW (fro...
entry.content:
You're seeing a Secure Connection Failed issue when trying to use SNC with AFO SAC Edition for SSO to SAP BW. Since SAP GUI with SNC works, the issue likely lies in the AFO SNC configuration.

Make sure of the following:-

  1. AFO is using the same Secure Login Client and SNC settings as SAP GUI.

  2. The SNC name in the AFO connection matches exactly with the backend.

  3. Ensure the SAP CommonCryptoLib is correctly installed and accessible to AFO.

Once aligned, the secure connection and SSO should work smoothly. Hope it helps!

entry.title: Re: Common issues in SAP Joule Activation in SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi Samir,

My user have display name, last name, email id field populated in S/4.  But the provisioning job got failed with error as read itself got failed this time as below.

error=Source path: $.displayName is not available in content, but is required in defined system transformation Caused by: Source path: $.displayName is not available in content, but is required in defined system transformation Caused by: No results for path: $['displayName'],

content=<hidden content> - Set property ips.trace.failed.entity.content=true to display the content of failed entities

Entity

System

Action

Read

Created

Updated

Deleted

Skipped

Failed

groupSource systemREAD735000007350
userSource systemREAD246200024620

Also i logged into Workzone with my id and assigned roles shows as below

Please help here.

entry.title: Decentralized TM and EWM - Order based STO
entry.content:
This is a product related query based on a statement in the PDF in the note 3423370.

It says "Intra-Company Stock Transport Order is Supported (outbound and inbound with EWM storage location) in case of TM in ERP system (TM & LE in same system) for embedded and decentral EWM" for Classic TM - EWM Integration (TM & EWM based on S/4HANA stack).

I am interested to know if it is really not supported if TM and EWM are both decentralized, so TM, EWM and LE are in 3 different boxes. 

SAP Transportation Management SAP Extended Warehouse Management

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytic Cloud (SAC) - Speedometer
entry.content: Excellent Information, I could get the required Viz using this. Thanks  a lot..

entry.title: Re: SAC Transport - to overwrite objects, but not data
entry.content:
Dear @Oleks_Master,

to transport master and transaction data, you need to activate Data in the Selected objects view.

 

With this setting, your master and transaction data will be exported.

During import you can select if you want to overwrite content with data (master and transaction data) or content only by removing deactivating the Include Data option.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP Community!
entry.content:
Hey Max, welcome to SAP Community!

Feel free to ask questions, share your knowledge, and connect with others who are just as passionate as you are^^

By the way, check our Location Groups out, maybe there's an event or a group that you can join if not you are more than welcome to start one.

Have fun!

entry.title: Re: How to activate Transaction Builder in SAP MDK ( not...
entry.content:
Thanks Bill but this doesn't seems to do it for me, here is the code

{
    "_Type": "Action.Type.ODataService.CreateEntity",
    "ActionResult": {
        "_Name": "create"
    },
    "OnFailure": "/xxxx/CreateEntityFailureMessage.action",
    "OnSuccess": "/xxx/Main/SessionNameCreate_Complete.js",
    "Target": {
        "EntitySet": "ZC_xxxx_STG",
        "Service": "/xxxservice"
    },
    "Properties": {
        "CampaignId": "#Control:FCampaignID/#Value",
        "Completed": "",
        "ProcessingStatus": "",
        "SessionArchived": "",
        "SessionId": "#Control:FC_SessionId/#Value",
        "RegNumber": "#Control:FC_RegNumber/#Value",
        "CustomerId": "#Control:FC_HospitalID/#Value",
        "SessionDate": "#Control:FC_SessionDate/#Value",
        "SessionTime": "#Control:FC_SessionTime/#Value"
    },
    "CreateLinks": [
        {
            "Property": "to_Customer",
            "Target": {
                "EntitySet": "xxxx_CUSTOMER",
                "QueryOptions": "$filter=CustomerId eq '{{#Control:FC_xxxxD/#Value}}'"
            },
            "_Enabled": true
        }
    ],
    "RequestOptions": {
        "RemoveCreatedEntityAfterUpload": true,
        "TransactionID": "ID1"
    }
}

entry.title: Re: Fetching Document id's for a Contract Workspace throu...
entry.content:
Hi Riyaz,
You can use the Project Document Management Retrieval API, with the endpoint as /projectDocuments/:ContractId as follows: 

GET https://{{baseUrl}}/api/retrieve-project-document/v1/prod/projectDocuments/CW1234567?
    &user={{user}}
    &passwordAdapter={{passwordAdapter}}
    &realm={{realm}}
accept: application/json
apiKey: {{apiKey}}
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}

Thank you

entry.title: Failed to Enable People Analytics due to IAS / IPS mismatch
entry.content:
we are in the process of enabling People Analytics (SAC embedded edition) and we are facing a strange issue on our Preview environment : 

IAS & IPS are different in these SF tenant.

does any other customer have faced similar issue where IAS url to authenticate to SF instance is different to IPS url .

these doesn't look like a proper configuration.

entry.title: SAP QM: How to Control Result Recording of a Non-Sequential MIC Based on Another MIC's Result
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement in SAP QM result recording (QE51N / QE01) related to dependent characteristics within the same operation (e.g., 0010).

 Business Logic:

  • MIC 2 is a decision MIC.

  • MIC 9 is dependent on MIC 2’s result.

The expected logic is:

  • If MIC 2 = Accept, then MIC 9 should be skipped

  • If MIC 2 = Reject, then MIC 9 must be recorded(either any other mic in non sequence)

Important Context:

I know that SAP supports sequence-based dependency — where the system controls the result recording of next MICs (like 3, 4) based on previous MIC results using sequence control and inspection points.

However, my requirement is different:

  • MIC 9 is not sequentially after MIC 2

  • MIC 9 may appear later in the list or randomly

  • I want to control MIC 9’s recording (mandatory or skip) based on MIC 2’s result — regardless of sequence

My Questions:

  1. Is there a standard enhancement point (User Exit or BAdI) where I can read the result of MIC 2 and enforce logic on MIC 9?

  2. Can QE_RESULT_PROCESSING (BAdI) or QEEM_RESULT_RECORDING_01 (User Exit) be used for such MIC-level validation during result save?

  3. Will this work for both QE51N and QE01?

  4. Are there any sample codes, implementation guidance, or alternative approaches for this kind of logic?

System Info:

  • All MICs are in the same operation

  • MIC 2 is required

  • MIC 9 is configured as optional + skip allowed

  • No sequence control or separate operations used

Any advice or real-time examples would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP S4/HANA Cloud Public, J58: Financial close - Bala...
entry.content: Dear Divyesh, I am working in SAP S/HANA Cloud Public Edition, here we can only use Fiori apps, I cannot use tcodes that you have mentioned.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere News in April
entry.content:
Hi @michael_keller-froehlich ,
the stacking of Analytic Models was delivered in April this year and is an available feature.  I will let my colleagues check the roadmap explorer, so that it is accurate. 
Best KP
